CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.auto_membership_grupos_tareas_fn()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  insert into grupos_tareas_miembros (id_grupo_tareas, user_id)
  values (new.id, new.created_by)
  on conflict (id_grupo_tareas, user_id) do nothing;
  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.auto_membership_grupos_fn()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  insert into grupos_miembros (id_grupo, user_id)
  values (new.id, new.created_by)
  on conflict (id_grupo, user_id) do nothing;
  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_auto_membresia_grupo()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
    insert into grupos_miembros (id_grupo, user_id)
    values (new.id, auth.uid())
    on conflict (id_grupo, user_id) do nothing;
    return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_auto_membresia_grupo_tareas()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
    insert into grupos_tareas_miembros (id_grupo_tareas, user_id)
    values (new.id, auth.uid())
    on conflict (id_grupo_tareas, user_id) do nothing;
    return new;
end;
$function$
CREATE TRIGGER set_created_by_grupos BEFORE INSERT ON public.grupos FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_created_by_grupos_fn()
CREATE TRIGGER auto_membership_grupos AFTER INSERT ON public.grupos FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION auto_membership_grupos_fn()
